organization.name: University Lending Group
organization.raw_address: 42452 Hayes Road, Suite 1, Clinton Township, MI 48038, US
organization.short_description:
University Lending Group (ULG) is a full-service mortgage bank that specializes in retail residential mortgage originations. Operating as a division of University Bank, ULG offers a variety of mortgage products for home purchases, refinances, new construction, renovations, and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs) across 40 states. The company emphasizes customer service, boasting a 98% satisfaction rate and average 24-hour underwriting turn times for purchase submissions.

Founded in May 2008, ULG has roots tracing back over 100 years to Newbury State Bank. It is headquartered in Charter Township of Clinton, Michigan, and employs between 201 and 500 people. ULG focuses on originating loans for sale to secondary market investors, including FHA, FNMA, FHLMC, USDA Rural Development, and VA. The company maintains a strong presence nationwide, with branches in various locations, including Tallahassee, Florida, where it is recognized as a leading mortgage lender.

organization.name: Absolute Home Mortgage Corp.
organization.raw_address: 165 Passaic Ave, Suite 411, Fairfield, New Jersey 07004, US
organization.short_description:
Absolute Home Mortgage Corporation is a mortgage banking service provider based in Fairfield, New Jersey. With over 20 years of experience in the industry, the company employs around 272 people and generates annual revenue of $138.2 million. It is recognized as an accredited business by the Better Business Bureau with an A+ rating and is a member of the Mortgage Bankers Association.

The company offers a range of mortgage banking services tailored to meet the needs of both new home buyers and existing homeowners. This includes mortgage solutions for first-time buyers, refinancing options, and customized loan products for clients with unique financial situations. Absolute Home Mortgage focuses on providing personalized lending solutions rather than one-size-fits-all options. With a growing presence along the East Coast and expansion into the Midwest and West Coast, the company has originated approximately $1 billion in mortgages, supported by a team of about 190 loan officers.

employment_history.title: SVP of Business Development and Support

organization.name: Benchmark Mortgage (NMLS #2143)
organization.raw_address: 5160 Tennyson Pkway, Suite 1000, Plano, TX 75024, US
organization.short_description:
Benchmark Mortgage is a nationwide mortgage lender and servicer based in Plano, Texas. Founded in 1999, the company has established itself as one of the fastest-growing mortgage companies in the U.S., operating in 48 states with over 80 branches. Benchmark offers a wide range of mortgage products, including conventional mortgages, FHA loans, VA loans, USDA loans, jumbo mortgages, reverse mortgages, and home equity lines of credit, with more than 250 loan programs available to meet diverse borrower needs.

The company prides itself on customer centricity and has built a strong team of mortgage professionals guided by core values of success, relationship, dynamic, excellence, and positive attitude. Benchmark processes loans efficiently, often in as little as 15 days, and partners with established companies for loan servicing. Recognized for its achievements, Benchmark has received accolades such as a spot on the Inc. 500 List and an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau. The company aims to be a "Lifetime Lender," focusing on long-term relationships and innovative solutions for its clients.

organization.name: Deephaven Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 3530 Toringdon Way, Suite 200, Charlotte, North Carolina 28277, US
organization.short_description:
Deephaven Mortgage, founded in 2012 and based in Charlotte, North Carolina, is a non-qualified mortgage lender specializing in innovative mortgage products for borrowers who may not qualify for traditional loans. As a business-to-business lender, Deephaven partners with over 1,000 independent mortgage brokers and more than 200 correspondent lenders across the country to originate, purchase, and securitize loans.

The company focuses on providing flexible underwriting solutions for underserved borrowers, including self-employed individuals, real estate investors, and foreign nationals. Deephaven offers a range of non-QM mortgage programs with features such as credit scores down to 660, loan amounts up to $3.5 million, and various options like interest-only terms. Their services also include training for loan originators and a scenario desk for guidance, ensuring comprehensive support for their partners in the mortgage industry.

organization.name: LendSure Mortgage Corp.
organization.raw_address: 12230 World Trade Drive, Suite 250, San Diego, California 92128, US
organization.short_description:
LendSure Mortgage Corp. is a national wholesale lender based in San Diego, California, specializing in Non-QM (non-qualified mortgage) loan programs. Founded in 2015 by Joseph J. Lydon and Stuart Marvin, the company focuses on providing flexible lending options for borrowers who do not meet traditional conforming guidelines. LendSure operates exclusively as a wholesale lender, serving mortgage brokers and professionals.

The company offers a range of Non-QM loan products, including Jumbo Prime and Super Prime loans, ATL-A loans, investor DSCR programs, bank statement loans, and loans for foreign nationals. These offerings cater to self-employed borrowers and those with alternative income documentation. LendSure emphasizes a pre-underwriting process, allowing in-house experts to review submissions for approvals and pricing, often within 24 hours, to streamline the lending experience. With around 230 employees, LendSure generates approximately $32.8 million in revenue.

organization.name: Franklin American Mortgage Company
keywords: home mortgage lending mortgage loan wholesale correspondent refinance loan originator account executi
organization.raw_address: 6100 Tower Circle, Suite 600, Franklin, TN 37067, US
organization.short_description:
Franklin American Mortgage Company (FAMC) is a full-service mortgage banking firm based in Franklin, Tennessee. Founded in 1994, it operates as a division of Citizens Bank, N.A., providing residential mortgage financing across the United States. FAMC has grown significantly since its inception, expanding from $20 million in annual lending to $2 billion within nine years. The company employs around 519 people and reported $203.7 million in revenue.

FAMC offers a variety of residential mortgage packages, including options for home purchases, refinancing, and wholesale mortgage lending. The company operates through three main divisions: retail, wholesale, and correspondent, ensuring personalized support for borrowers, brokers, and lenders. FAMC is licensed nationwide and is recognized as an FHA Direct Endorsed lender, VA Automatic lender, and seller/servicer for Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae. Additionally, FAMC is involved in community sponsorships, including the Franklin American Mortgage Music City Bowl, supporting charitable causes and youth athletic organizations.

organization.name: Union Home Mortgage Corp.
organization.raw_address: 8241 Dow Circle West, Strongsville, OH 44136, US
organization.short_description:
Union Home Mortgage Corp. is a full-service mortgage banker based in Strongsville, Ohio, founded in 1970. The company is dedicated to making homeownership accessible for everyone and has successfully guided hundreds of thousands of homebuyers through the process. Led by President and CEO Bill Cosgrove, Union Home Mortgage operates in 48 states and Washington D.C., with an annual lending volume exceeding $5 billion.

The company offers a variety of mortgage products and services, including a 1% Down Payment Program for first-time homebuyers, USDA mortgage lending, home equity lines of credit, and refinancing options. Union Home Mortgage is recognized as one of the top USDA mortgage lenders in the nation. The company fosters a unique culture by referring to its workforce as "Partners" and has received numerous accolades, including multiple appearances on the Inc. 500 list and recognition as a Top Workplace in Northeast Ohio and by USA Today.

organization.short_description:
Mutual of Omaha Mortgage is a dedicated home financing subsidiary of Mutual of Omaha Insurance Company, established in 2016. With a legacy dating back to 1909, the company operates in 49 states, providing a customer-centric approach to mortgage lending. It combines online and retail services, ensuring a fully digital experience alongside traditional in-person support.

The company offers a wide range of home financing solutions, including conventional, FHA, VA, jumbo, USDA, and investor loans, as well as various refinancing options. They cater to diverse borrower segments, including first-time homebuyers, veterans, existing customers, and property investors. Mutual of Omaha Mortgage is committed to long-term customer support, emphasizing integrity and transparency throughout the homeownership journey. The lender is recognized for its competitive interest rates and user-friendly application process, earning high ratings for affordability and availability.

organization.short_description:
Nations Direct Mortgage (NDM) is a nationwide wholesale mortgage lender based in Henderson, Nevada, with a focus on originating and purchasing residential mortgage loans. Founded in 2007, the company partners with mortgage brokers and non-delegated sellers across 41 states. NDM offers a comprehensive range of residential mortgage products, including conventional loans, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo loans, and various non-QM programs. The company emphasizes efficient processes, competitive rates, and exceptional support for its broker partners.

With a workforce of over 250 employees, NDM operates under a permanent work-from-anywhere model. The company fosters a strong culture of service, quality, and integrity, led by experienced professionals in the mortgage industry. NDM is also committed to community involvement, partnering with organizations like The Jessie Rees Foundation to support children with cancer. Recognized as the No. 1 Midsize Company by Top Workplaces, NDM is dedicated to providing a rewarding workplace and maintaining strong relationships with its partners.

organization.raw_address: 5875 N Sam Houston Parkway West | Suite 300, ID# 205696, Houston, Texas 77086, US
organization.short_description:
InterLinc Mortgage Services, LLC is a full-service residential mortgage banking firm based in Houston, Texas. Founded in 2004, the company has expanded significantly, growing from four employees to nearly 470 across over 40 branch locations in 21 states, primarily in the Midwest and Southeast. InterLinc is approved by major entities such as HUD, VA, USDA, Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae.

The company is dedicated to helping around 25,000 families each year achieve their home financing goals. InterLinc offers a range of mortgage services, including conventional, FHA, VA, and USDA loans, as well as proprietary programs like Renovation and Texas Vet loans. They focus on providing an integrated experience for first-time homebuyers and refinances, supported by strong partnerships with builders and REALTORS®. InterLinc also invests in technology to enhance communication and streamline the mortgage process. The company is recognized for its commitment to service, community involvement, and workplace excellence.

organization.name: Homestead Financial Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 14897 Clayton Road, Chesterfield, MO 63017, US
organization.short_description:
Homestead Financial Mortgage is a mortgage lending company based in Chesterfield, Missouri, founded in 1998. Initially a sub-prime mortgage broker, it has evolved into a fully delegated mortgage banker with 89 employees serving the Midwest and southcentral U.S., including Missouri, Kansas, Illinois, and Texas. The company is dedicated to making the borrowing experience seamless and non-intimidating, emphasizing trust, transparency, and personalized service.

Homestead offers a range of mortgage solutions, including purchase and refinance loans. They handle the entire loan process in-house, ensuring competitive low-interest rates and on-time closings. Their streamlined approach includes a simple six-step process for clients, from application to closing. The leadership team, with decades of experience, focuses on growth and client service, fostering a supportive workplace culture. Homestead aims to be the most trusted lender by leveraging technology and strong relationships to enhance financial well-being for its clients.

organization.raw_address: 950 Trade Centre Way, Suite 400, Kalamazoo, MI 49002, US
organization.short_description:
Amerifirst Home Mortgage is a mortgage banking company based in Portage, Michigan, founded in 1983. It specializes in residential mortgage lending, offering conventional loans, government-backed programs, and renovation mortgages. The company has grown to over 300 licensed loan consultants across the United States, with a strong presence in states like Florida, Michigan, Ohio, North Carolina, and California. 

In December 2022, Amerifirst was acquired by Union Home Mortgage, enhancing its national reach, particularly in USDA Rural Development loans. The company emphasizes ethical practices and customer commitment under the motto "Promises Kept." Amerifirst provides a full range of mortgage services, including FHA, VA, and USDA loans, and is recognized for its strong performance in the Michigan market.

Century Lending funds and securitizes loans originated by business partners, banks and direct mortgage lending entities. organization.raw_address: 950 Glenn Dr, Suite 150, Folsom, California 95630, US
organization.short_description:
Sierra Pacific Mortgage Company, Inc. (SPM) is an independent mortgage banking firm established in 1986 and based in Folsom, California. It has become one of the largest mortgage lenders in the U.S., originating and purchasing billions in residential loans across the country. SPM holds licenses in 49 states and the District of Columbia, supported by multiple Regional Fulfillment Centers and over 129 branch offices. The company is committed to quality lending practices and exceptional customer service, operating under the motto "Promises Made. Promises Kept."

SPM offers a range of competitively priced residential mortgage products, including government-backed and conventional loans such as FHA, VA, and USDA options. The company conducts business through wholesale, retail, and correspondent lending channels, focusing on providing efficient service and effective communication to enhance the borrower experience. Led by President Jim Coffrini, SPM aims to be the lender of choice, emphasizing innovation and strong partnerships in the mortgage industry.

organization.name: American Bank
organization.raw_address: 4800 Montgomery Ln, Bethesda, Maryland, United States, 20814
organization.short_description:
American Bank is a values-driven financial institution serving communities in Texas. It is dedicated to personalized service and community involvement, offering a wide range of banking products and services for both personal and business customers. The bank is known for its local expertise and is preparing to merge with Prosperity Bank in late 2025 or early 2026, which will enhance its capabilities.

The bank provides various personal banking options, including checking and savings accounts, credit cards, personal loans, and mortgage refinancing. For businesses, it offers lending solutions, equipment financing, and merchant services. American Bank also features digital tools for online and mobile banking, allowing customers to manage their accounts anytime. Additionally, it offers wealth management services, including investment tools and trust services, as well as specialized accounts for youth and seniors. With a focus on community banking values, American Bank aims to support financial growth and stability for individuals and businesses in Texas.

organization.short_description:
Paramount Residential Mortgage Group Inc. (PRMG Inc.) is a privately held mortgage company and residential home lender founded in 2001 in Southern California. The company specializes in helping borrowers purchase and refinance homes across the United States. With a workforce of over 2,000 employees and nearly 180 branches in 49 states, PRMG has established itself as one of the top mortgage lenders in the country.

PRMG offers direct lending for home mortgages, focusing on home purchases, refinances, and home equity unlocking. Their services include 100% online applications with quick approvals, personalized mortgage solutions, and support for first-time homebuyers. The company also provides reverse mortgages and emphasizes customer service, transparency, and expertise, as reflected in thousands of positive reviews. PRMG is dedicated to creating a supportive corporate culture that fosters career growth and team spirit.
